goal: Classify, prioritize, extract key fields, and route the single email to the correct internal queue. Then mark it resolved and finish.

emails.subject: Double charge on my account - urgent
emails.body:
Hi,

I was charged twice for my semester fee. Both transactions show on my bank statement. Transaction IDs: TXN-2024-88341 and TXN-2024-88342. Please refund one immediately. My student ID is STU-4421.

Regards,
Rahul
